title: Mirror a photo column in a monday.com doc

posts.author: Emil25 (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

When exporting a monday.com doc which has a mirrored field of a photo column, the photos do not display. Is there any way around this?

I have created a ‘site diary’ board for our site crews to post daily updates. I have then created a monday.com doc template which pulls data into a report which can be sent to the client. Everything works, just not the photos.

image1560×461 66.3 KB

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml: I need the same functionality. Has anyone been able to do this using markup or html code in the template?

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Emil25 This is a current limitation of monday docs. Mirrored Files or Photo columns don’t render images in docs or exports and instead show protected URLs.

There isn’t a supported workaround using HTML or markup. Docs can’t resolve mirrored file authentication on export.

Workarounds:
Use the original Files or Photo column instead of a mirror.
Reference item Updates where photos are attached.
Share the board or item in view-only mode instead of exporting a doc.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Tuesday Wizard
